case_title: GEYER, LAPIDOS & COUNTRYMAN, INC. VS SECREST, KELLY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY GEYER, LAPIDOS & COUNTRYMAN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SECREST, KELLY SIGNATURE CONTRACTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERTIFIED MAIL TO KELLY SECREST C/O SIGNATURE CONTRACTING RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEYER, LAPIDOS & COUNTRYMAN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SECREST, KELLY SIGNATURE CONTRACTING $520.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
